'''Rokna Station''' was a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] that was erected in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] in the [[Endor system/Legends|Endor system]], between the [[Planet/Legends|planets]] [[Megiddo]] and [[Dor]]. It was built some twelve [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], and was named for the illicit refining of Rokna that took place during the early years of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. However, due to the New Republic's swift crackdown on the production of [[Rokna Blue|Rokna blue]], the station was abandoned just ten months after its completion. The drug kingpin known as [["Blue" Imcrix]] tried to re-establish the production facilities on the station, but the New Republic quickly shut him down.
